name: codoop-flow
description: Guardrailed AI coding ticket pipeline: pick, build, verify, multi-review, and archive one ticket at a time.

interface.longDescription: Run AI coding work as a guarded ticket pipeline. codoop-flow lets Codex pick one pending ticket, build in an isolated git worktree, verify tests, run review personas, sync living docs, and archive the ticket to done or failed.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repo for codoop-flow.
Draft and promote a codoop-flow ticket.
